name: eager-l3-reload-smoke
description: Phase M1 follow-up — verifies the new Canary `Reload` action (added 2026-05-25 to QualiaBridgeAgent.cs) survives mid-test page navigation. Seeds a localStorage sentinel, triggers `Reload` via the bridge agent's CDP NavigateAsync + WaitForReadyInternalAsync flow, then asserts: (a) the sentinel persists across the reload (localStorage preserved by design), AND (b) `__canaryHooksReady` is true post-reload (proves the bridge re-waited for the new execution context). Throws (CRASH outcome) if either assertion fails; renders a green PASS badge otherwise. This is the foundational smoke for the three eager-L3 fixtures that depend on mid-test reload.

actions.command: (() => { const sentinel = localStorage.getItem('canary.reload-smoke.sentinel'); if (!sentinel || !sentinel.startsWith('pre-reload-')) { throw new Error('reload-smoke: sentinel lost across reload — got ' + JSON.stringify(sentinel)); } if (window.__canaryHooksReady !== true) { throw new Error('reload-smoke: hooks not ready post-reload — bridge agent did not re-establish properly'); } return 'survived: ' + sentinel; })()

(() => { const b = document.createElement('div'); b.id = 'canary-reload-smoke-badge'; b.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:8px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#2a7;color:#fff;padding:6px 14px;font-family:monospace;z-index:99999;font-size:14px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:bold;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);'; b.textContent = 'PASS reload action survived'; document.body.appendChild(b); return true; })()
